subject: [PATCH v3 10/10] docs: fuse: add io-uring buffer pool and zero-copy documentation

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds documentation to the Linux kernel's FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) module for using buffer pools and zero-copy functionality with io-uring. The documentation explains how to use buffer pools, which decouple the relationship between entries and payload buffers, allowing for more efficient memory usage. It also describes how the server manages the buffer pool through a buffer ring, enabling features like incremental buffer consumption and multiple buffer sizes per ring. This patch aims to improve performance by reducing unnecessary copies of data between kernel and user space.
